nasb.text: “For long ago I broke your yoke And tore off your bonds; But you said, ‘I will not serve!’ For on every high hill And under every green tree You have lain down as a harlot.

esv.text: “For long ago I broke your yoke and burst your bonds; but you said, ‘I will not serve.’ Yes, on every high hill and under every green tree you bowed down like a whore.

cnv.text: “你從古時就折斷了自己的軛， 解開了自己的繩索， 說：‘我不事奉你了。’ 你在每個高岡上， 在每棵繁茂樹下， 蹲伏行淫。

ccb.text: “很久以前，我折断你的轭， 解开你的捆索， 你却拒绝事奉我， 在各高岗上、绿树下躺卧淫乱。
